name: Peter Paul Mounds Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Bake a dark chocolate cake mix in a large sheet cake pan.
2. While the cake is baking, mix together the evaporated milk, sugar and marshmallows. Heat just until the marshmallows are melted.
3. Remove from heat and add 14-ounce package of coconut. Spread mixture on slightly warm cake.
4. For the icing, cook sugar, milk and butter (or margarine) just until boiling. Take off heat and add 1 1/2 cups chocolate chips. Stir until chips are melted. Pour on cake.
